title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tech Mahindra - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tech Mahindra - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Tech Mahindra has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tech Mahindra:
Tech Mahindra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra!
